item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Few Mjondays are good Mjondays, so make the best of it. I am, so now you get the 251nd eromeme album.
item.description:
An update for the fuuuture! I got hired somewhere. I do not expect to have the same kind of free time my last job gave me, and I do not know if I will be able to maintain my current posting schedule or responsivity. I am fine, just being responsible. So to that end, here in the next few weeks, just be patient as I try and find a new rhythm!
Queck
SO. Sometimes you can see the good times while you are in them. Most times you can't. Look at your friends, tell them you appreciate them, tell them they matter, and make some extra time to spend with them. Do new things, do old things with new vigor, and just generally cherish the time you get to have with them. One day you may not be able to spend that time with them anymore! They could be on opposing schedules, have kids, or just have gotten distant, and it's much better to be nostalgic for better days than it is regret never properly enjoying them. Here's the archive of previous posts! May your way be Green and Golden! http://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG

again

still on board

you didn't have to yell
looks like more than one egg
there goes my weekend plans
mmm hmm
we've all done this
dang
wholesome
it's a building
looks good just need that tv a little more elevated
crabs always go for busch light
as is tradition
that's my time... have a great night gang!!

item.title: I participated in a challenge where you have to make a dagger within 48 consecutive hours. Here's how it turned out!
item.description:
This is what I ended up with! I'm about 85% happy with it. Of the 48 hours I ended up working on it for 27.5 of it, 31.5 if you include the time the blade was in the tempering oven
Here's a little close up on the guard portion of the build, I've wanted to re-visit polished stainless steel for a while now so it was nice getting this excuse.
Here's the handle, it was my first time doing an inlay like this, it wasn't as difficult as I thought it would be but I definitely learned a lot so my next one should be significantly better :)
Here's the bottom spacer/pommel assembly, originally I wasn't planning on including the thinner stepped in spacer between the butt cap and the handle but I'm so glad I did. It's now one of my favourite parts of the build :) Inevitably someone will ask about balance, this is balanced exactly on the cross guard.
And here's a little video. The materials are 80CRV2 blade, 440C stainless guard and fittings, a couple 316 stainless spacers, and some pretty ebony for the handle. Thanks to Neels Van Den Berg for setting this challenge, I absolutely love taking part every year and seeing the amazing work everyone else puts out is just awesome. It really brings the knife community together. I can't wait for next year! Thanks for reading this far, let me know how you think I did :)
item.dc:creator: Nedfly

item.title: France’s arrest of Telegram’s CEO Because of Not Enough Moderators, People Think Who's Next? Elon Musk?
item.description:
Chairman of social media platform X and billionaire Elon Musk on Saturday expressed shock at the alleged arrest of Telegram CEO and founder Pavel Durov. What Happened: “POV: It's 2030 in Europe and you're being executed for liking a meme,” Musk wrote on X in response to reports of Durov’s arrest, hinting that the arrest is a result of extreme regulation and censorship in the region.
Telegram was founded in 2013 by Durov with his brother Nikolai and is one of the most popular messaging apps now. The CEO lives in Dubai but also holds citizenship in France.
Telegram was founded in 2013 by Durov with his brother Nikolai and is one of the most popular messaging apps now. The CEO lives in Dubai but also holds citizenship in France.
What to Know About Pavel Durov, the Russian Billionaire Founder of Telegram https://time.com/7014726/pavel-durov-russian-billionaire-telegram-founder-net-worth-bio-children/
